# Studio 925

> Studio 925 is a one-person web design studio in Leitchfield, Kentucky, building custom websites for small businesses. Sites are coded from scratch rather than assembled from templates or page builders, with a focus on speed, SEO, and clear conversions. The studio serves Grayson County, Kentucky, and remote clients.

## About Studio 925

- Owner and designer: Kara Gibson
- Based in Leitchfield, Kentucky 42754
- Email: kara@studio925.design
- Phone: +1-270-551-2210
- Hours: Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/studio925design
- One-time build pricing starts at $900; ongoing care plans start at $25/month
- Services Grayson County, KY and small businesses statewide in Kentucky

## Core pages

- [Home](https://studio925.design/): Overview of Studio 925, services, pricing, and contact
- [Portfolio](https://studio925.design/portfolio): Featured client projects with PageSpeed results
- [Website Cost](https://studio925.design/website-cost): Breakdown of what a small business website costs and why
- [Hosting & Support](https://studio925.design/hosting-support): Ongoing hosting, backups, and maintenance plans
- [Blog](https://studio925.design/blog): Articles on small business web design, pricing, and hiring

## Services

- Foundation website ($900 one-time): Up to 5 pages, mobile-first, custom design, contact form, launch support, full ownership after final payment
- Growth website ($1,800 one-time): Up to 10 core pages, adds hands-on SEO audit, service pages, simple CMS, analytics and lead tracking, 30 days post-launch support
- Online Store website ($2,600 one-time): Up to 15 core pages, adds a full online store with payments and customer management, 60 days guided support
- Basic Hosting ($25/month): Hosting, secure backups, uptime management
- Full Support ($49/month): Hosting plus content updates, layout tweaks, and ongoing SEO work — new service pages, blog posts, meta tags, and indexing; includes market exclusivity in your niche and area

## Service areas

- [Leitchfield, KY](https://studio925.design/website-design-leitchfield-ky): Local web design in Leitchfield
- [Grayson County, KY](https://studio925.design/web-design-grayson-county-ky): Web design across Grayson County
- [Kentucky (statewide)](https://studio925.design/small-business-website-design-kentucky): Small business web design for Kentucky

## Portfolio projects

- [CS Media](https://cscreatesmedia.com): Media brand site built for clear service positioning and lead generation
- [925 ADHD](https://925adhd.com): SaaS platform for remote work with a gated resource library and Stripe subscriptions
- [Four Chariots](https://4chariots.com): Apparel e-commerce brand with a streamlined purchasing flow
- [Townly](https://townly.us): Community platform that organizes local businesses and neighborhood info

## Blog

- [Is a Custom Website Worth It? Here's the Math](https://studio925.design/blog/is-custom-website-worth-it): ROI math on whether a custom site pays for itself for a small business
- [What to Look for in a Local Web Designer](https://studio925.design/blog/what-to-look-for-in-a-local-web-designer): What matters when hiring a local designer and the red flags to avoid
- [Wix vs Custom Website](https://studio925.design/blog/wix-vs-custom-website): Cost, speed, and SEO comparison between Wix and a custom-built site
- [Your Website Is a Tax Write-Off](https://studio925.design/blog/your-website-is-a-tax-write-off): How a business website is typically treated as a deductible expense
